meaning: n.<<奥义书>>(印度教古代吠陀教义的思辩作品,为后世各派印度哲学所依据)
examples: The Isha - upanishad emphasizes the identity of the human soul with the divine soul.
The Katha - upanishad, through the story of Nachiketa, discussed death and the permanence of the soul (Atman).
The term bhakti, in the sense of devotion to a personal god, appears in the Bhagavadgita and the Svetasvatara Upanishad.
Rajesh's violence and the wisdom of the sacred Upanishad literature remain equally mysterious to him.
